title: Raw Robust Italian Prawns Trofie
description: A fermented, snappy Italian dish featuring raw tiger prawns, long-fermentation-dough, and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients, served in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: Rinse the banana leaves and cut them into large squares.
In a large bowl, mix together the long-fermentation-dough, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the raw tiger prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the dough mixture.
Spoon the prawn mixture onto the center of each banana leaf square.
Fold the banana leaves over the filling to form a trofie shape and secure with a toothpick.
Place the trofie on a serving plate and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional lemon wedges and garlic if desired.
Discard the banana leaves after serving.
Refrigerate any leftovers promptly and consume within a day.
